ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "exp_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "exp_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment ended */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., active, completed, paused) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the experiment */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Detailed environmental conditions for the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wells" (
  "well_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each well */,
  "well_name" TEXT /* Name of the well */,
  "exp_id" TEXT /* ID of the experiment the well belongs to */,
  "initial_condition" TEXT /* Initial conditions of the well */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the well within the experimental setup */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the well was created */,
  "initial_biomass" REAL /* Initial biomass of the well */,
  "initial_richness" INTEGER /* Initial richness of the microbial community */,
  "initial_phenotype" REAL /* Initial phenotype score */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the well */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_exp_id FOREIGN KEY ("exp_id") REFERENCES experiments ("exp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_initial_condition FOREIGN KEY ("initial_condition") REFERENCES initial_conditions ("condition_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer event */,
  "well_id" TEXT /* ID of the well involved in the transfer */,
  "transfer_number" INTEGER /* Number of the transfer event */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer event */,
  "transfer_details" TEXT /* Details of the transfer event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transfer event was recorded */,
  "source_well_id" TEXT /* ID of the source well for the transfer */,
  "transfer_volume" REAL /* Volume of the transfer */,
  "transfer_method" TEXT /* Method used for the transfer */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the transfer */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_source_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_transfer_details FOREIGN KEY ("transfer_details") REFERENCES transfer_details ("detail_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community metric */,
  "well_id" TEXT /* ID of the well the metric belongs to */,
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transfer the metric is associated with */,
  "community_phenotype" REAL /* Community phenotype score */,
  "richness" INTEGER /* Richness of the microbial community */,
  "biomass" REAL /* Biomass of the microbial community */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the metrics were measured */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., phenotype, richness, biomass) */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the metric */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the metric */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_metrics_transfer_id FOREIGN KEY ("transfer_id") REFERENCES transfers ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_metrics_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation or organization of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the user record */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "exp_id" TEXT /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the log */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_exp_id FOREIGN KEY ("exp_id") REFERENCES experiments ("exp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "initial_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each initial condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the initial condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the initial condition */,
  "initial_biomass" REAL /* Initial biomass for the condition */,
  "initial_richness" INTEGER /* Initial richness for the condition */,
  "initial_phenotype" REAL /* Initial phenotype score for the condition */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the condition */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environmental conditions of the location */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the location */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfer_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer detail */,
  "detail_name" TEXT /* Name of the transfer detail */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transfer detail */,
  "transfer_volume" REAL /* Volume of the transfer */,
  "transfer_method" TEXT /* Method used for the transfer */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the detail */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id")
)
